name: Apoo Scratchmen
alt_names: スクラッチメン・アプー
description:
__Affiliations:__ On Air Pirates; ~!Beasts Pirates!~
__Occupations:__ Pirate; Captain; Musician; 
__Height:__ 256 cm (8'5")
__Bounty:__
~!Before timeskip: 198,000,000 Beli
After timeskip: 350,000,000 Beli!~

Scratchmen Apoo is the captain of the On Air Pirates. He and his crew originated from the Grand Line. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the "Worst Generation". ~!He became a subordinate to the Yonkou Kaidou.!~
